summary: Iteration 34: Complete testing of IA CAD v5.1 dimension inputs and 3D rendering. ALL critical features verified working - dimension inputs (L/W/H) appear for every element type, 3D viewer renders all 8 element types correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: <span> inside <tbody> triggers console warning. This is cosmetic only - functionality unaffected.

passed_tests: === DIMENSION INPUT TESTS (CRITICAL) ===
✅ Add wall via add-wall-btn -> dims-0 РАЗМЕРИ section appears with L(дължина)/W(дебелина)/H(височина)
✅ Add door via add-door-btn -> dimension inputs with L(дължина) + door params Шир(width)/Вис(height)
✅ Add column via add-column-btn -> dimension inputs with D(диаметър)/H(височина)
✅ Add beam via add-beam-btn -> dimension inputs with L(дължина)/H(височина) + beam params Шир/Кота
✅ Add roof via add-roof-btn -> dimension inputs + angle(Ъгъл) and overhang(Надвес) parameters
✅ Add window via add-window-btn -> dimension inputs with L + window params Шир/Вис/Перваз(sill)
✅ Add stairs via add-stairs-btn -> dimension inputs with L + stairs params Стъпала/Rise/Run/Шир
✅ Add slab via add-slab-btn -> dimension inputs with X(ширина)/Y(дълбочина)/Z(дебелина)
=== 3D VIEWER RENDERING TESTS ===
✅ All 8 element types render simultaneously in 3D viewer
✅ Wall renders as gray 3D box mesh
✅ Door renders as brown door frame with panel
✅ Window renders as white frame with blue glass
✅ Column renders as cylindrical mesh (gray)
✅ Beam renders as horizontal box at elevation
✅ Roof renders as orange triangular prism shape
✅ Stairs renders as stepped structure (orange when selected)
✅ Slab renders as flat box mesh
=== DIMENSION EDITING TESTS ===
✅ Change wall length in dimension input -> value updates
✅ Cost estimate updates when dimensions change
=== AUTO-SELECT AND INTERACTION TESTS ===
✅ After drawing on canvas, newly created element is auto-selected (has orange border-[#FF8C42] styling)
✅ Type switching works - clicking type button changes element type (wall->roof)
✅ Delete button (delete-obj-X) removes elements correctly
✅ Object cards reindex after deletion
=== COST ESTIMATE TESTS ===
✅ Cost estimate appears when objects added
✅ Shows itemized costs: Бетон, Кофраж, Арматура, Мазилка, Керемиди, etc.
✅ Displays totals in EUR and BGN formats
✅ Updates dynamically when objects added/removed
critical_code_review_comments: 1. CostEstimate.jsx: The items.map() inside <tbody> wrapped with <span> causes React hydration warning. Consider using React.Fragment or removing wrapper span. Functionality unaffected but shows warning in console.
2. All dimension inputs working correctly with proper L/W/H/D labels in Bulgarian

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All critical dimension input and 3D rendering features pass

seed_data_creation: None required - tests use UI interactions to add elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 verified ALL NEW dimension input features in IA CAD v5.1. Every element type (wall, door, window, column, beam, roof, stairs, slab) now shows РАЗМЕРИ section with editable L/W/H/D dimension inputs. 3D viewer renders all 8 element types correctly. Type switching, delete, and auto-select all working. Minor React hydration warning in CostEstimate component (cosmetic only).

wall_dimension_inputs.details: РАЗМЕРИ section with L(дължина)=15м, W(дебелина)=25см, H(височина)=3м

door_dimension_inputs.details: РАЗМЕРИ section with L + Шир(width)=0.9м, Вис(height)=2.1м

beam_dimension_inputs.details: РАЗМЕРИ section with L=15м, H=45см, Шир=25см, Кота=2.7м

roof_dimension_inputs.details: РАЗМЕРИ section with L, H + Ъгъл(angle)=30°, Надвес(overhang)=0.5м

window_dimension_inputs.details: РАЗМЕРИ section with L + Шир=1.2м, Вис=1.5м, Перваз(sill)=0.9м

stairs_dimension_inputs.details: РАЗМЕРИ section with L + Стъпала=8, Rise=0.17м, Run=0.3м, Шир=1.2м

slab_dimension_inputs.details: РАЗМЕРИ section with X(ширина)=10м, Y(дълбочина)=5м, Z(дебелина)=15см

3d_viewer_all_elements.details: All 8 element types render correctly: wall(box), door(frame), window(glass), column(cylinder), beam(box), roof(prism), stairs(steps), slab(flat box)

dimension_editing.details: Changing dimension values updates elements and cost estimate

auto_select_after_draw.details: Drawn elements auto-selected with orange border-[#FF8C42] styling

type_switching.details: Clicking type buttons (Стена, Покрив, etc.) changes element type

cost_estimate.details: EUR/BGN totals display correctly with itemized costs
